window {{ duration }}

n = {{ n }}

below threshold {{ noise_threshold }}
Removed (noise)
{{ n_removed }}
at-or-above threshold
Kept — signal input order · max {{ kept.len() }} of {{ n_kept }}
{% if !has_kept %}
Nothing survived denoising — every record's n-grams are at or above the threshold. Raise the threshold to keep more.
{% else %} {% for r in kept %} {% endfor %}
# Idx Commonness Fingerprint
{{ loop.index }} {{ r.idx }} {{ "{:.3}"|format(r.commonness) }} {{ r.text }}
{% endif %}
Removed — noise most-common first · max {{ removed.len() }} of {{ n_removed }}
{% if !has_removed %}
Nothing was removed — no record reached the noise threshold. Lower the threshold to denoise more aggressively.
{% else %} {% for r in removed %} {% endfor %}
# Idx Commonness Fingerprint
{{ loop.index }} {{ r.idx }} {{ "{:.3}"|format(r.commonness) }} {{ r.text }}
{% endif %}
